summary.zh: 长臂管辖、实体清单、最终用途限制、对外投资规则和再出口规则会把看似普通的交易纳入高风险审查。
summary.en: Long-arm jurisdiction, entity lists, end-use controls, outbound investment rules, and re-export rules can pull ordinary transactions into high-risk review.

signals: 客户拒绝披露最终用途
controls: 客户和受益所有人筛查

summary.zh: 跨境数据流动、远程访问、AI训练数据、用户告知和本地化要求正在同时影响平台、智能硬件和SaaS业务。
summary.en: Cross-border data flows, remote access, AI training data, user notices, and localization rules now affect platforms, connected devices, and SaaS businesses at once.

title.en: Supply chain, labour, and human rights

summary.zh: 强迫劳动、原产地、承包商用工、宿舍条件和上游材料证明正在从ESG叙事变成清关、采购和平台准入条件。
summary.en: Forced labour, origin, contractor labour, dormitory conditions, and upstream material proof are becoming customs, procurement, and platform-access conditions.

title.zh: 贸易救济、补贴与产业政策
title.en: Trade remedies, subsidies, and industrial policy

summary.zh: 反补贴、反倾销、外国补贴审查和本地产业保护会把企业的成本优势、政府支持和市场行为放在同一张证据表里审查。
summary.en: Countervailing duties, anti-dumping, foreign subsidy review, and industrial-policy protection assess cost advantages, state support, and market conduct together.

summary.zh: 关键技术、基础设施、数据资产和关联中国控制关系会触发外资审查、政府采购排除或证券市场限制。
summary.en: Critical technology, infrastructure, data assets, and China-control links can trigger foreign investment review, procurement exclusions, or capital-market restrictions.

title.zh: 平台、产品安全与消费者保护
title.en: Platform, product safety, and consumer protection

summary.zh: 跨境电商和平台企业同时面对商品安全、商家可追溯、暗黑模式、广告透明、低值包裹税关和召回义务。
summary.en: E-commerce and platform businesses face product safety, trader traceability, dark-pattern, ad transparency, low-value shipment, tax/customs, and recall duties.

summary.zh: SEP/FRAND、禁令、ITC、商标抢注、开源代码和商业秘密争议会直接影响硬件、通信和平台生态出海。
summary.en: SEP/FRAND, injunctions, ITC actions, trademark squatting, open-source code, and trade secrets can directly affect hardware, telecoms, and platform ecosystems.

summary.zh: 海外仓、售后、代理、平台销售、转让定价和全球最低税正在压缩空壳控股与利润转移空间。
summary.en: Overseas warehouses, after-sales, agents, platform sales, transfer pricing, and global minimum tax are narrowing the room for shell holding and profit shifting.

summary.zh: 政府项目、国企客户、代理、顾问、通关和本地合作方会把企业放入多法域反腐、制裁和采购禁入风险中。
summary.en: Government projects, SOE customers, agents, advisers, customs brokers, and local partners can expose firms to multi-jurisdiction anti-bribery, sanctions, and debarment risk.

title.en: Climate, ESG, and sustainable supply chains

summary.zh: CBAM、强迫劳动产品禁令、CSDDD和客户尽调要求会把碳数据、人权尽调和供应商管理转化为商业准入门槛。
summary.en: CBAM, forced-labour product bans, CSDDD, and customer due diligence turn carbon data, human-rights diligence, and supplier management into market-access gates.

summary.zh: 扣货、突检、员工事故、媒体曝光、禁令和政府调查要求企业在第一小时、二十四小时和第一周有清晰剧本。
summary.en: Detentions, dawn raids, labour incidents, media exposure, injunctions, and investigations require clear first-hour, 24-hour, and first-week response scripts.
